title: Create debounce utility
system: You are a senior TypeScript developer. Always export your functions. Never add comments to code.
user:
Create and export a function `createDebounce` that creates a debounced version of a function.

Requirements:
1. Function signature: `export function createDebounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(fn: T, delay: number): (...args: Parameters<T>) => void`
2. The returned function delays calling fn until delay ms have passed since the last call
3. If called multiple times within the delay, only the last call executes
4. Use setTimeout internally with cleanup

Only output the function code. Make sure to use `export` keyword.
